title: Harvest. Barter. Subjugate.
description: Voidborn offers no mercy, only power to those who harvest its forbidden relics. Forge your dominance with every flesh-bound card you wrench from the dark, every ruthless bargain you strike, and every lethal deck you bind to your will.

features.title: Expand Your Grimoire
features.description: Feed your insatiable arsenal. Continuously swell your collection of malevolent incantations across dozens of cursed sets and forgotten expansions.

features.title: Blood-Market Trade
features.description: Target your prey with precision. Hunt the black market and claim the exact, agonizing hexes required to perfect your strategy.

features.title: Sealed Vaults
features.description: Shatter the seals of ancient Arcane Vaults and exhume their buried horrors. Every tomb holds the promise of a cataclysmic discovery.

features.title: Exhume the Legendary
features.description: Dig through the ashes to unearth mythic-tier abominations and legendary curses—devastating anomalies capable of tearing victory from the jaws of oblivion.

features.title: Liquidate the Unwanted
features.description: Purge the weak. Melt down duplicates and useless relics into cold credits by listing them on the market for desperate souls to fight over.

features.title: Shape Your Malice
features.description: Weave and refine lethal deck builds. Experiment with volatile synergies, brutal counters, and forbidden arcane combinations.

tiers.title: Tactical Depth
tiers.description: Every collection needs its backbone. Uncover versatile spells, key synergy pieces, and battle-tested champions that bridge the gap between a basic deck and a masterclass strategy.

tiers.title: Rare Discoveries
tiers.description: Every pack is a portal to the unknown. Pull striking holographic foils, coveted regional variants, and exclusive alternate-art cards that define your identity as a collector.

tiers.title: Epic Synergy
tiers.description: The battlefield favors the bold. Unleash devastating arcane combos, high-tier elemental engines, and game-changing abilities that turn the tide of battle in a single turn.

marketCta.description: Ready to begin your collection? Over 10,000+ cards await in the market.
